what_it_does: Records metadata for a channel attachment that links to a board item via a board:// URI.
observations: The file contains only YAML frontmatter and no body content.
It declares an attachment id att-79096827 in channel dragnet-development.
The target is a board:// URI pointing to item-438d2f67.
An added timestamp is present in ISO 8601 format with timezone.
standouts: Target uses a board://item-438d2f67 URI scheme.
attachment_type is board_items, indicating a typed cross-entity link.
conventions: Id prefix att- for attachment records.
Cross-resource reference expressed as a board:// URI.
concerns: No body or payload describing the actual attachment content.
No filename, MIME type, or size.
No indication whether the attachment is inbound or outbound relative to the board item.
notes: A minimal, typed metadata stub that ties a dragnet-development channel attachment to a specific board item.
questions: What content or file does this attachment represent?
Who added this attachment and why?
What does board item item-438d2f67 contain?
Is the board:// target expected to be resolvable within the ledger?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose matches content: it is a board_items attachment record pointing to a board item.
intention_signals: It appears to be trying to establish a durable, typed association between a channel attachment and a board item so the relationship can be retrieved or traversed later.
contribution: Provides a timestamped, typed link between a channel attachment and a board item, preserving the channel context and target identity for fusion or traversal.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter attachment metadata record in the dragnet-development channel that references board item item-438d2f67 with type board_items and an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record that a channel attachment is associated with a specific board item for later lookup and contextual reconstruction.
